LLM_NO_API_KEY.suggestion: Go to Settings and add your API key.

LLM_RATE_LIMIT.suggestion: Wait a moment and try again.

LLM_CONTEXT_TOO_LONG.message: Conversation too long for this model.
LLM_CONTEXT_TOO_LONG.suggestion: Start a new chat or reduce context.

LLM_PROVIDER_ERROR.suggestion: Check your connection or try a different provider.

LLM_INVALID_PROVIDER.suggestion: Check your provider settings in AI Configuration.

LLM_INVALID_RESPONSE.message: Received an invalid response from AI provider.
LLM_INVALID_RESPONSE.suggestion: Try again or switch to a different provider.

LLM_MODEL_NOT_AVAILABLE.message: Model not available for this provider.
LLM_MODEL_NOT_AVAILABLE.suggestion: Choose a different model in Settings > AI Configuration.

GITHUB_AUTH_REQUIRED.suggestion: Connect your GitHub account in Settings.

GITHUB_RATE_LIMITED.suggestion: Wait a few minutes and try again.

GITHUB_REPO_NOT_LINKED.suggestion: Link a repository in project settings.

DATABASE_LOCKED.suggestion: Wait a moment and try again.

DATABASE_NOT_INITIALIZED.suggestion: Wait for Venore to finish starting up.

NOT_FOUND.suggestion: Venore may still be starting up. Wait a moment and try again.
